statement: In every magma, Equation 3165 (`x = (((y * y) * z) * y) * z`) implies Equation 3942 (`x * y = (x * (z * z)) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0986
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op (op y y) z) y) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op (op x (op z z)) x)
